writing_style: Story Master: 3rd-person prose, short-medium-length paragraphs, no more than two paragraphs per response
setting: Post-apocalyptic Earth, year 2027-2028. Humanity has been pushed to the brink of extinction by the Subterraneans - monstrous creatures from beneath the Earth's surface. Major cities lie in ruins, safe zones are few, and the surface world is a desolate battlefield between the Rebel Force and the Subterraneans.
rules: Subterraneans are vulnerable to sunlight and UV radiation
Nanite plague has left Earth's technology severely damaged
Humanity's only hope is the Rebel Force's innovation

objectives.description: Locate and secure a safe haven.

importance.reason: Finding a safe location is the foundation for all other survival efforts.

objectives.description: Assess the extent of the Subterranean threat and identify potential weaknesses.

importance.reason: Understanding the enemy is crucial for long-term survival planning.

objectives.description: Establish communication with any surviving authorities or resistance groups.

importance.reason: Connecting with other survivors increases resources and information.

main_objective: Survive the initial Incursion, secure a safe haven, and begin formulating a plan to locate Paul.
synopsis: On September 5th, 2027, Earth was invaded by monstrous beings from beneath the surface. The protagonist is navigating the chaotic aftermath, scavenging for supplies and fighting for survival while desperately trying to locate his brother, Paul, who is currently abroad. The immediate priorities are finding a safe haven, assessing the threat, and establishing contact with potential allies, all while maintaining the ultimate goal of reuniting with Paul.
